phrases.cultural_note: Tours are guided by a miner guide (horník) and depart at fixed intervals, not continuously.

likely_response.local: Každou celou hodinu, další je v jedenáct.
likely_response.translation_en: Every hour on the hour, the next one is at eleven.

responses.english: Every hour on the hour, the next one is at eleven.
responses.french: Každou celou hodinu, další je v jedenáct.

phrases.intent_en: Where are Hrádek mine tour tickets?
phrases.text_local: Kde jsou lístky na důlní prohlídku Hrádek?
phrases.cultural_note: The Hrádek building houses the mine tour entrance; tickets are sold inside, not at a separate booth.

likely_response.local: U pokladny v přízemí, vpravo od vchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket counter on the ground floor, to the right of the entrance.

responses.english: At the ticket counter on the ground floor, to the right of the entrance.
responses.french: U pokladny v přízemí, vpravo od vchodu.

phrases.intent_en: Is photography allowed in the mine?
phrases.cultural_note: Photography is usually permitted in the mine, but flash is prohibited to protect the environment and for safety.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I rent an audio guide?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically rented at a dedicated desk near the museum entrance, separate from the ticket counter.

likely_response.local: Hned u vstupní haly, pult vlevo.
likely_response.translation_en: Right by the entrance hall, counter on the left.

responses.english: Right by the entrance hall, counter on the left.
responses.french: Hned u vstupní haly, pult vlevo.
